user_message:

Tone: functional, approachable, modern

brief.headline: Shelf Improvement
brief.caption: A KALLAX shelf unit is styled in a living room setting, showcasing its versatility with a mix of books, plants, and decorative items neatly arranged to demonstrate both storage and display capabilities.
brief.visual_style: Clean, minimalist visuals with bright, natural lighting emphasizing simplicity and versatility.
brief.typography_style: IKEA's signature bold sans-serif, utilitarian and readable
brief.color_scheme: natural wood tones, white, and soft greens
